evals.name: restaurant-profile
evals.prompt: I'm trying to decide whether to take a client to Le Bernardin in NYC next month. Can you put together a quick profile? I need: head chef's name, michelin star count, cuisine type, average dinner price per person in USD, dress code, and the URL where I'd actually book a reservation. Cite sources for each fact so I can double-check the prices haven't moved.
evals.expected_output: Markdown report containing all six requested fields with at least one citation URL per fact, ideally with per-field provenance.

assertions.text: report.md exists in the outputs/ directory
Names a specific head chef (not 'unknown' or vague)
States a specific Michelin star count (an integer)
States cuisine type
Provides a concrete dinner price per person figure in USD
Includes a real reservation URL pointing to lebernardin.com, Resy, Tock, or OpenTable
Mentions a specific dress code
Has at least 3 distinct citation URLs across the six fields
Includes a confidence/staleness note

evals.name: company-discovery
evals.prompt: I'm a VC associate sourcing for a Series B fund. Find me 8-10 companies in the developer-tooling space (specifically: testing, CI/CD, observability, code quality) that recently raised Series A or B. For each, give me: company name, what they do in one sentence, last announced round size, and HQ city. I'd rather have 8 well-described companies than 15 thin entries.
evals.expected_output: A table or list with 8-10 companies, each with the four requested fields filled in, with citations to funding announcements.

assertions.text: report.md exists
Contains 8 or more company entries
Each entry has a clear company name
Each entry has a one-sentence description
At least 80% of entries name a concrete round size
At least 80% of entries name an HQ city
Each entry has at least one citation URL
Companies span at least two of: testing / CI-CD / observability / code quality
No obvious dupes

evals.name: place-itinerary
evals.prompt: I'm flying into Lisbon next Friday morning for the weekend - touch down ~10am Friday, leaving Sunday afternoon. I really want to see Alfama and Belém. Build me a real 2-day itinerary with specific places, opening hours where they matter (the monasteries close early on Mondays I think?), how to get between them, and one good food stop per half-day. Don't include obvious tourist traps. Cite where you got hours/closures from.
evals.expected_output: A structured day-by-day itinerary with named places, opening hour callouts, transit notes, and at least 4 food stops, all with citations to recent sources.

assertions.text: report.md exists
Covers at least 2 distinct days with named places
Includes specific places in BOTH Alfama and Belém
Names at least 4 specific food stops
Includes opening hours for Jerónimos Monastery
Mentions transit between Alfama and Belém
Has at least 5 citation URLs
Addresses the closure question (Mondays / specific weekday closures)
Includes a tourist-traps-to-skip note
